SE_Order_Organization_AD_Org_ID.description: Set defaults when organization changes (trigger: AD_Org_ID)
SE_Order_Organization_AD_Org_ID.impactIfOmitted: Organization-dependent defaults (warehouse, price list) not auto-set

SL_Order_DocType_C_DocTypeTarget_ID.description: Auto-configure order based on document type selection (trigger: C_DocTypeTarget_ID)
SL_Order_DocType_C_DocTypeTarget_ID.impactIfOmitted: Document type sub-settings not applied automatically

SL_Order_UpdateLinesDate_DateOrdered.description: Propagate order date changes to order lines (trigger: DateOrdered)
SL_Order_UpdateLinesDate_DateOrdered.impactIfOmitted: Line dates would not sync with header date changes

SL_Order_UpdateLinesDate_DatePromised.description: Propagate promised date changes to order lines (trigger: DatePromised)
SL_Order_UpdateLinesDate_DatePromised.impactIfOmitted: Line dates would not sync with header date changes

SL_Order_PriceList_M_PriceList_ID.description: Update currency and tax settings from price list (trigger: M_PriceList_ID)
SL_Order_PriceList_M_PriceList_ID.impactIfOmitted: Currency mismatch and wrong tax settings after price list change

SE_Order_BPartner_C_BPartner_ID.description: Auto-fill address, contact, price list, payment terms from business partner (trigger: C_BPartner_ID)
SE_Order_BPartner_C_BPartner_ID.impactIfOmitted: User must manually set all partner-related fields

SL_Charge_C_Charge_ID.description: Set charge amount and tax when charge selected (trigger: C_Charge_ID)
SL_Charge_C_Charge_ID.impactIfOmitted: Charge lines would lack proper tax and amount

SE_Order_BPartnerLocation_C_BPartner_Loc.description: Update tax zone and delivery info from partner location (trigger: C_BPartner_Location_ID)
SE_Order_BPartnerLocation_C_BPartner_Loc.impactIfOmitted: Tax calculations may use wrong zone after location change

SE_Order_Project_C_Project_ID.impactIfOmitted: Project defaults not populated; minor for simplified UI

SL_Order_Product_M_Product_ID.description: Auto-fill UOM, price, tax, description when product selected (trigger: M_Product_ID)
SL_Order_Product_M_Product_ID.impactIfOmitted: User must manually set price, tax, UOM for every line

SL_Order_Amt_QtyOrdered.description: Recalculate line amounts when quantity changes (trigger: QtyOrdered)
SL_Order_Amt_QtyOrdered.impactIfOmitted: Line amounts would not update when quantity changes

SL_Order_Amt_PriceActual.description: Recalculate line amounts when net unit price changes (trigger: PriceActual)
SL_Order_Amt_PriceActual.impactIfOmitted: Line amounts would not update when price changes

SL_Order_Amt_PriceList.description: Recalculate discount when list price changes (trigger: PriceList)

SL_Order_Amt_C_Tax_ID.description: Recalculate gross amounts when tax changes (trigger: C_Tax_ID)
SL_Order_Amt_C_Tax_ID.impactIfOmitted: Gross amounts would be wrong after tax change

SL_Order_Amt_LineNetAmt.description: Back-calculate price and discount from line net amount (trigger: LineNetAmt)
SL_Order_Amt_LineNetAmt.impactIfOmitted: Editing line net amount would not update price/discount

SL_Order_Amt_Discount.description: Recalculate price from discount percentage (trigger: Discount)
SL_Order_Amt_Discount.impactIfOmitted: Discount changes would not affect unit price

SL_Order_Amt_Gross_Unit_Price.description: Recalculate net price from gross price (trigger: Gross_Unit_Price)
SL_Order_Amt_Gross_Unit_Price.impactIfOmitted: Net price would not sync with gross price changes

SL_Order_Charge_Tax_C_Charge_ID.description: Set tax for charge lines (trigger: C_Charge_ID)
SL_Order_Charge_Tax_C_Charge_ID.impactIfOmitted: Charge lines would have no tax set

SL_Order_Tax_C_BPartner_Location_ID.description: Recalculate tax when line partner address changes (trigger: C_BPartner_Location_ID)
SL_Order_Tax_C_BPartner_Location_ID.impactIfOmitted: Tax zone not updated for line-level address changes

OperativeQuantity_To_BaseQuantity_C_Aum.description: Convert operative quantity to base UOM quantity when alternative UOM changes (trigger: C_Aum)
OperativeQuantity_To_BaseQuantity_C_Aum.impactIfOmitted: Base quantity would not update when UOM changes

OperativeQuantity_To_BaseQuantity_Aumqty.description: Convert operative quantity to base UOM quantity (trigger: Aumqty)
OperativeQuantity_To_BaseQuantity_Aumqty.impactIfOmitted: Base quantity would not update when operative qty changes

SL_Order_Conversion_M_Product_Uom_Id.description: Convert order UOM quantity (trigger: M_Product_Uom_Id) - legacy second UOM mechanism
SL_Order_Conversion_M_Product_Uom_Id.impactIfOmitted: Legacy dual-UOM not supported; replaced by AUM mechanism

SL_Order_Conversion_QuantityOrder.description: Convert order UOM quantity (trigger: QuantityOrder) - legacy second UOM mechanism
SL_Order_Conversion_QuantityOrder.impactIfOmitted: Legacy dual-UOM not supported; replaced by AUM mechanism

SL_Order_Amt_M_AttributeSetInstance_ID.description: Recalculate amounts when attribute set instance changes (trigger: M_AttributeSetInstance_ID)
SL_Order_Amt_M_AttributeSetInstance_ID.impactIfOmitted: Attribute set is system-level field; no user interaction expected

SL_Order_Amt_CANCELPRICEAD.description: Recalculate amounts when cancel promotions toggled (trigger: CANCELPRICEAD)
SL_Order_Amt_CANCELPRICEAD.impactIfOmitted: Cancel promotions is system-level field; no user interaction expected

Val_C_BPartner_Location_ShipTo.description: Filter partner addresses to ShipTo locations for C_BPartner_Location_ID
Val_C_BPartner_Location_ShipTo.impactIfOmitted: Non-shipping addresses would appear in dropdown

Val_C_BPartner_Location_BillTo.description: Filter partner addresses to BillTo locations for BillTo_ID
Val_C_BPartner_Location_BillTo.impactIfOmitted: Non-billing addresses would appear in dropdown

Val_C_DocType_PO_SO.description: Filter document types by PO/SO flag and return/quotation status
Val_C_DocType_PO_SO.impactIfOmitted: Wrong document types would appear (SO types in PO window)

Val_M_PriceList_isSOTrx.description: Filter price lists to purchase-only lists
Val_M_PriceList_isSOTrx.impactIfOmitted: Sales price lists would appear in purchase order

Val_AD_User_BPartner_Contacts.description: Filter user contacts by selected business partner
Val_AD_User_BPartner_Contacts.impactIfOmitted: Contacts from other partners would appear

Val_FIN_PaymentMethod_IsSOTrx.description: Filter payment methods by payout capability for purchase orders
Val_FIN_PaymentMethod_IsSOTrx.impactIfOmitted: Payment methods without payout support would appear

Val_C_Tax_IsSOTrx_Date.description: Filter taxes by purchase type, validity date, and client
Val_C_Tax_IsSOTrx_Date.impactIfOmitted: Invalid or expired taxes would appear in selector

Val_C_Aum_UOM.description: Filter alternative UOMs to those valid for the product and purchase direction
Val_C_Aum_UOM.impactIfOmitted: Invalid UOMs would appear in selector

Val_C_Project_Status_BPartner.description: Filter projects by open/order status; purchase orders allow any partner
Val_C_Project_Status_BPartner.impactIfOmitted: Closed projects would appear in selector

ReadOnly_Processed_Header.description: Make header fields read-only when order is processed (@Processed@='Y')
ReadOnly_Processed_Header.impactIfOmitted: Users could attempt to edit processed orders

Process_ProcessOrder.description: Process Order (complete, void, close) - core document lifecycle action
Process_ProcessOrder.impactIfOmitted: Orders cannot be completed or voided

Process_AddPayment.description: Add Payment via OBUIAPP process handler
Process_AddPayment.impactIfOmitted: Cannot add payments directly from order

Process_CopyFromOrders.description: Copy lines from other orders via OBUIAPP process
Process_CopyFromOrders.impactIfOmitted: Must create lines manually; advanced feature not needed in simplified UI

Process_CreatePOLines.description: Create PO lines from requisitions or other sources
Process_CreatePOLines.impactIfOmitted: Must create lines manually; advanced procurement feature

Process_CopyLines.description: Copy lines from historical orders (classic process)
Process_CopyLines.impactIfOmitted: Must create lines manually; replaced by simpler workflows

Process_Explode.description: Explode BOM product into component lines
Process_Explode.impactIfOmitted: BOM explosion not available; advanced manufacturing feature

Process_ManagePrereservation.description: Manage stock prereservation pick and edit
Process_ManagePrereservation.impactIfOmitted: Stock prereservation not available in simplified UI

Process_Post.impactIfOmitted: Posting happens through standard accounting; not needed in simplified UI

AuxInput_GROSSPRICE.description: Determine if price list includes tax (IsTaxIncluded from M_PriceList)
AuxInput_GROSSPRICE.impactIfOmitted: Cannot toggle between net and gross price display

AuxInput_Processed.description: Inherit processed status from parent order for read-only logic
AuxInput_Processed.impactIfOmitted: Line fields would not become read-only when order is processed

AuxInput_UsesAlternate.description: Check if tax uses alternate base amount
AuxInput_UsesAlternate.impactIfOmitted: Alternate taxable amount field display logic would not work

AuxInput_showAddPayment.description: Determine if Add Payment button should show (check if fully paid)
AuxInput_showAddPayment.impactIfOmitted: Add Payment button visibility logic would not work

AuxInput_APRM_OrderIsPaid.description: Check if order is fully paid for Add Payment button visibility
AuxInput_APRM_OrderIsPaid.impactIfOmitted: Add Payment button shown even when order is fully paid
